archetype: 7 (Electric & Neon) merged with 4 (Swiss & High Contrast) - Dark Mode

layout.alignment: Left-align forms, dashboards, and job listings. Center-align hero headings.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-all
buttons.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all shadow-lg rounded-lg
buttons.neon_outline: bg-transparent border border-primary/50 text-primary hover:text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary transition-colors hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(6,182,212,0.4)] rounded-lg

cards.glass_card: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl hover:border-primary/50 hover:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(6,182,212,0.1)] transition-all

inputs.glass: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary backdrop-blur-md rounded-lg text-white transition-all placeholder:text-white/40

motion.stagger_children: Use Framer Motion to stagger list items (job postings, companies) on enter

images.description: 3D abstract geometric shape floating in dark void, cyan and green glowing edges. Use as background for the hero section with a dark overlay (bg-black/40).
Dark sleek abstract background with subtle cyan/green grid lines and glassmorphism elements. Great for login pages or profile backgrounds.
Student working on laptop in dark environment. Use for About or How it Works section.

media.icons_strategy: Use Lucide React icons. For company placeholder logos in the '100% Verified Companies' section, use bold geometric icons (e.g., Hexagon, Triangle, Zap, Command, Cloud) sized large (w-12 h-12) wrapped in a glassmorphic circle container.

specific_instructions.hero_section: Implement a 3D Animated Hero Section. If possible, integrate Spline or React Three Fiber. If not, simulate 3D depth by placing 'hero_background' behind a heavy backdrop-blur (bg-black/50) overlay and use parallax scrolling on Framer Motion elements. The main headline should be massive and punchy.
specific_instructions.student_login_registration: Student auth flows MUST use heavy glassmorphism for the form container (`backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10`). Integrate a glass-styled Drag-and-Drop Resume Upload zone within the registration step.
specific_instructions.company_verification_flow: Company profiles need a 'Verified' badge (Neon Green/Emerald). Companies post 'skill-based' internships, requiring specific form fields during the creation flow.
specific_instructions.profile_requirements: Student profiles MUST enforce LinkedIn URL addition. Include fields for GitHub, Behance, and Portfolio. Add Weekly Progress Logs functionality. Create an Admin Panel to view both profiles and check applications.
specific_instructions.components_ui: Use Shadcn UI (Forms, Tables, Dialogs, Selects) heavily but OVERRIDE their default styles to match the Dark/Glassmorphism/Neon aesthetic. Replace solid backgrounds on cards with `bg-white/5` and `backdrop-blur`.
specific_instructions.animations: Inject small animations everywhere. Button hover states should slightly scale up and increase their border glow. Job cards should lift off the page on hover (`-translate-y-1` with increased cyan shadow).
specific_instructions.architecture_notes: Structure the React app cleanly so API endpoints can easily point to a separately hosted backend (e.g., use an environment variable for the API base URL).
specific_instructions.data_testid: MANDATORY: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements, buttons, links, and forms for automated testing.
